task: My name is Mike. I want to send my friend Christene (christenson@gmail.com) a Dillard's “Merry Christmas” eGift Card worth $100 for next Christmas, with the message “Merry Christmas, wish you many more years to come.” Add it to my cart.
graderReasoning: The agent reached Dillard’s eGift card product page and verified the available card designs in the dropdown. The options shown were only: Dillard's - Navy, Dillard's - Red, Congrats - Stripe, Congratulations - Floral, Thank You, Birthday - Green Envelope, Birthday - Blue Envelope, Little One - Blue/Pink/Yellow, and A Gift for You - Blue Envelope. There was no “Merry Christmas” or holiday design available. Since the task specifically required a Dillard’s “Merry Christmas” eGift Card design, and the site did not offer that design, the requested task could not be completed as specified. Although the agent at one point managed to add an eGift card variant to the cart, it was not the requested Merry Christmas design, so the correct verdict is impossible rather than success.
final_result_response: I’ll do that in the same active tab now, then verify the Shopping Bag page text immediately.
